title: solanum dulcamara subsp. pusztarum
intro: Solanum dulcamara subsp. pusztarum, also known as climbing nightshade, is a subspecies of the Solanum dulcamara plant that is native to Eastern Europe and Asia. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its content of solanine and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Solanum dulcamara subsp. pusztarum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce pain. Solanum dulcamara subsp. pusztarum can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various ailments.
